items.body_excerpt: Today Kevin Love joins us for Episode 2 of our NBA Finals 10-Year Reunion series, and somehow we covered everything from his favorite thing to watch on YouTube (my highlights... and no, I'm not kidding) to the moments that shaped the 2016 Cavs championship run. items.title: Kevin Love joins The Richard Show | NBA Finals 10-Year Reunion
items.author: Richard A. Jefferson
items.body_excerpt: Coming Sunday... Kevin Love sits down for our second NBA Finals 10-Year Reunion episode! We cover everything from his favorite thing to watch on YouTube (my highlights...no I'm not joking) to the memories that defined our 2016 finals run. A decade later, the stories are better…
